comments: Approved. git show 8d3cfc6 matches the execution result artifact: implementation changes are limited to src/mcp-server/src/index.ts, and artifact changes are limited to tasks/v0.5-m3-execution-result.json and tasks/v0.5-m3-result-review-packet.json. The new MCP tools get_execution_diff and get_dispatch_state are read-only in the reviewed implementation, using git diff and fs.readFile without workflow mutation, auto-approval logic, or reviewer identity redesign. Per governance, tasks/*.json workflow metadata is exempt from the allowed_files implementation constraint.
